zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave於1315年5月4日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特時，他的父親Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave30歲，母親Alice FitzAlan26歲。他於1335年與Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1353年4月1日在英國德比夏爾雷普頓享年37歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave于1315年5月4日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特时，他的父亲Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave30岁，母亲Alice FitzAlan26岁。他于1335年与Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1353年4月1日在英国德比夏爾雷普頓享年37岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave was born on 4 May 1315, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, his father, Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave, was 30 and his mother, Alice FitzAlan, was 26. He married Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk in 1335, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 April 1353, in Repton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave est né le 4 mai 1315, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzAlan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk en 1335, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1353, à Repton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave am 4. Mai 1315 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave 30 und seine Mutter Alice FitzAlan 26. Er hat 1335 in England Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. April 1353 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Repton, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave è nato il il 4 maggio 1315 nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzAlan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk nel 1335, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 aprile 1353, nel Repton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Segrave 4th Baron Segraveが1315年5月4日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターで生まれた時，父Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segraveは30歳，母Alice FitzAlanは26歳であった。1335年にイギリスでMargaret of England Duchess of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1353年4月1日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアレプトンで37歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャコンベチャコンベ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave(이)가 1315년 5월 4일 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzAlan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1335년 영국에서 Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1353년 4월 1일 영국 더비실르 레프턴에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 차코브 차코브 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.4 May 1315–1 April 1353: 4 de maio de 1315–1 de abril de 1353
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave nasceu em 4 de maio de 1315, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzAlan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk em 1335, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1353, em Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave родился 4 мая 1315 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzAlan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk в 1335 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 апреля 1353 г. в местности рептон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности чакомб приори, чакомб, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.4 May 1315–1 April 1353: 4 de mayo de 1315–1 de abril de 1353
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave nació el 4 de mayo de 1315, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice FitzAlan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk en 1335, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de abril de 1353, en Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
